titleStmt.title: SII 9.570: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 570. (A.R. No. 4 of 1904.) ON THE SOUTH BASE OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF THE VITTHALASVAMI TEMPLE AT HAMPI, HOSPET TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1456, Jaya, Pushya, śu. 6, Gu[ruvāra], corresponding to A.D. 1534 December 10, Thursday, f.d.t. ·09, in the reign of Achyutadēvarāya-Mahārāya. It records that Varadappa-Nāyaka, son of Tiruvēṅgaḷa-Nāyaka, made a gift of gold to the treasury of the Viṭṭhalēśvara temple for the daily offerings of the god. The gift was made for the merit of the king and of Chikkarāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1456 ṟa neya jayasaṁvacharada puśya śu 6 gu lū śīmatu
śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa Acyutadēvarāyamahārāyarū pruthvīrājyaṁgeIuttaṁ yi
ralu . caturthagotrada talibaṇada baḷiya tiravēṁgaḷanāyakara maga varadappanāyakarū barasida dharmaśāsana ta(ṁ)mma voḍeyaru
Accutadēvarāyamahārāyarigū cikkara yarigū pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgabēkū Eṁdu śrīviṭhalēśvaradēvarige nityanaivēdya naḍevadakke
dēvara Ugrāṇadalu koḍuva dānada kaṭaḷege dēvara bhaṁḍārake samarpisida ghaṭṭiI varahakaṁ baḍi
tiṁgaḷuvoṁdake ghaṭṭivaraha hattū varahakke sale cakra ga 11 ¥ 4 ṇakkaṁ Ugrāṇadalū koḍuva davasa kaṭaḷe
dina 1 dakke Akki paḍi 40 mēlōgara Uppu meṇasu sambhāra hesaṟu harivāṇake tuppa sakhare bāḷehaṇṇuhālu
mosaru vīḷeya dīvige 2 I pramāṇina davasavanū koṭṭu naḍasi baraluḷadu I naivēdya nirmālya vecca
da dharmaū tamma voḍeya Acutadēvarāyamahārāyarige pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgi māḍida dharma
I dharmakke Āru tappidarū śrīviṭhaladēvara pādakke tappidavaru gōhatya bra(ṁ)hmahatya bhrūṇahatyādi mahāpātakava māḍida pāpakke hōharu .
Digital edition of SII 9.570 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
